## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Run command '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Error Message
```
Paste the full error message and traceback here
```

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., macOS 13.0, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.11.5]
- Perple_X version: [e.g., 7.1.4]
- Planetary EOS Lab version: [e.g., 1.0]
- Installation method: [e.g., pip, git clone]

## Configuration
Relevant parts of your `configs/models.json`:
```json
{
  "perplex_dir": "/path/to/perplex",
  ...
}
```

## Additional Context
- Screenshots (if applicable)
- Composition files being used
- Any customizations made
